events.event_description: Henry Percival Dodge presented credentials as Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary to the Kingdom of the Serbs, Croats, and Slovenes, establishing a U.S. Legation.

evidence.quote: Henry Percival Dodge, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1919-07-17. Credentials presented: 1919-10-05. Left post on 1926-03-21. Note: Commissioned to the Kingdom of the Serbs, Croats, and Slovenes.

events.event_description: Anthony Joseph Drexel Jr Biddle was promoted from Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary, elevating the U.S. mission near the Yugoslav government-in-exile in England from a Legation to an Embassy.

evidence.quote: Anthony Joseph Drexel Jr Biddle, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1941-07-30. Credentials presented: 1941-10-03. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1942-10-03. Note: Served near the Government of Yugoslavia established in England.

events.event_description: Embassy Belgrade was closed, ending U.S. diplomatic representation in Yugoslavia.

evidence.quote: Richard Monroe Miles, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Credentials presented: 1996-08. Embassy Belgrade closed on 1999-03-23. Note: Embassy personnel left Serbia-Montenegro on March 24, 1999.
